title: Rameshvara Temple, Koodli
tagline: Rameshvara Temple, Koodli — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Rameshvara temple is a 12th-century Shiva temple in Kudli, Shimoga district, Karnataka India.
overview.description: The Rameshvara temple is a 12th-century Shiva temple in Kudli, Shimoga district, Karnataka India. It is an early non-ornate, Hoysala construction with simpler Vesara style. The village of Koodli – also spelled Kudli, Kudali – was a major town through the 14th-century and of great antiquity, with ruins of over eight major Hindu temples and monasteries (Advaita, Dvaita, Shakta). It is located about 18 kilometres (11 mi) north-east of Shimoga city, the district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Koodli
topPlaces.description: Koodli, also spelled Kudli or Kudali, is a small historic village in Shimoga District, in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is at the sangam (confluence) of two rivers, the Tunga River and Bhadra River at nearly 1,200 metres (3,937 ft).

topPlaces.name: Tunga River
topPlaces.description: The Tunga River (alternatively spelled Thunga) is a river in Karnataka state, southern India. The river is born in the Western Ghats (Sahyadri Mountains) on a hill known as Varaha Parvata at a place called Gangamoola in Chikkamagaluru district.

topPlaces.name: Agasanahalli (Bhadravati)
topPlaces.description: Agasanahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Bhadravati taluk of Shimoga district in Karnataka.

The Tunga River (alternatively spelled Thunga) is a river in Karnataka state, southern India. The river is born in the Western Ghats (Sahyadri Mountains) on a hill known as Varaha Parvata at a place called Gangamoola in Chikkamagaluru district.
Agasanahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Bhadravati taluk of Shimoga district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rameshvara Temple, Koodli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rameshvara Temple, Koodli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rameshvara Temple, Koodli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (144 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (156 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rameshvara Temple, Koodli?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rameshvara Temple, Koodli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rameshvara Temple, Koodli?
faq.a: Stays in Rameshvara Temple, Koodli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rameshvara Temple, Koodli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Koodli, Tunga River, Agasanahalli (Bhadravati).
